title: Hardening Agents with Guardrails
tagline: Stop your agent leaking, hallucinating, or going off-script: validated I/O with Guardrails.

story.problem: A capable agent is also a liability: it can leak PII, emit unsafe content, drift off-topic, or return malformed output that breaks downstream code.
story.solution: Wrap the agent in Guardrails: input validators (PII, prompt-injection, topic) and output validators (schema, toxicity, groundedness) that run on every request, with a re-ask loop when a check fails.
story.outcome: An agent you can put in front of real users — one that fails closed, scrubs sensitive data, and guarantees the shape of what it returns.

endpoints.description: Run the guarded agent — validated input and output — and stream SSE events back.
Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint, including guardrail pass/fail counters.
